tool.name: header_analyzer
tool.description: Analyze HTTP security headers for misconfigurations.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Full analysis of HTTP security headers - Analyze Content Security Policy (CSP) - Check HSTS configuration - Analyze cookie security attributes - Get security header recommendations

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The analysis action to perform: - analyze: Full header analysis - check_csp: Analyze Content Security Policy - check_hsts: Analyze HSTS configuration - check_cookies: Analyze cookie security attributes - recommendations: Get security header recommendations

parameter.name: headers
parameter.description: HTTP response headers to analyze (dict). Required for analyze action.

parameter.name: csp
parameter.description: Content Security Policy header value (for check_csp)

parameter.name: cookies
parameter.description: List of Set-Cookie header values (for check_cookies)

returns.description: Analysis results including issues, recommendations, and security score

tool.examples:
# Full header analysis
analyze {"Content-Type": "text/html", "Server": "nginx"}
# Check CSP
check_csp default-src 'self'; script-src 'unsafe-inline'
# Check HSTS
check_hsts max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains
# Check cookies
check_cookies ["session=abc123; Secure; HttpOnly"]
# Get recommendations
recommendations
